|desc={{p|Magmortar}} is the only known Pokémon in Flint's possession. He was seen with Flint in the Fight Area along with Volkner and his {{p|Electivire}}. Later, he fought Giratina at the Distortion World only to be defeated. Later, he fought Giratina again, this time actually managing to defeat it.

Magmortar's only known move is {{m|Lava Plume}}, and his Ability is {{a|Flame Body}}.}}
